title: Goat Leather
tagline: Fine grain, soft hand-feel, light weight.
blurb: Softer hand-feel and finer grain than buffalo or cow leather - suited to wallets and small leather goods.
heroIntro: Where buffalo leather is chosen for strength, goat leather is chosen for feel. Its tighter, finer grain and lighter weight give it a soft drape that buffalo and cow hides can't match - the right material for products that are judged by touch as much as durability.
characteristics: Lightweight with a soft, supple drape
Strong strength-to-weight ratio for its thinness
